title: NinetailedExperience
description: A resolved Ninetailed experience with the variant assigned to the visitor, returned as part of a profile response.

experienceId.description: Unique identifier of the experience or experiment.

variantIndex.description: Zero-based index of the assigned variant (0 = control, 1+ = variants).

variants.description: Map of component keys to variant entry IDs for this experience assignment.

sticky.description: When true, the variant assignment is persisted for consistency across requests.

Change.description: A content change instruction for a personalized experience.

key.description: Identifier of the component or content slot to change.

type.description: Type of change. Currently only 'Variable' is supported.

value.description: The variant entry ID to render for this component.

meta.description: Metadata about the experience driving this change.

experienceId.description: ID of the experience that produced this change.

variantIndex.description: Variant index assigned for this experience.
